title: dryopteris sandwicensis
intro: Dryopteris sandwicensis, also known as the Hawaiian lady fern, is a species of fern native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dryopteris sandwicensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to support immune function and overall well-being.
